title: What was the lock for
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] What was the lock for?             Quote Post by Pman » Sun May 30, 2010 12:05 pm So what was the point of the lock on her TEST plug suit? I can't really think of any reason for it to be there.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun May 30, 2010 12:43 pm Why is the damn thing see-through?

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun May 30, 2010 1:40 pm why even bother with a non see through pants ? if Asuka wasnt either a loli or a bare shaver, we would see the hairs anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun May 30, 2010 1:48 pm I have a feeling you're going to be asking that same question about this thread soon. Keep it on track.

[]: Re: What was the lock for? (SPOLIER)             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 30, 2010 3:17 pm Pman wrote: So what was the point of the lock on her TEST plug suit?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 31, 2010 10:25 am When I saw the topic title, I thought somebody was complaining about a locked thread.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 31, 2010 11:44 am It doesn't look like a lock to me, however I am curious about what it actually is.

[]:             Quote Post by Delular » Mon May 31, 2010 2:52 pm The Eva Monkey!! Mines bigger than yours XD http://img684.imageshack.us/img684/2718/vlcsnap2010053123h46m04.png

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 31, 2010 2:59 pm Delular wrote: The Eva Monkey!! Mines bigger than yours XD http://img684.imageshack.us/img684/2718/vlcsnap2010053123h46m04.png

[]:             Quote Post by simon » Mon May 31, 2010 6:05 pm because it's only for watching, not for riding.

[]:             Quote Post by Delular » Tue Jun 01, 2010 1:21 am Oh.. Sorry Eva Monkey, re-reading rules so I don't screw up again. :S

[]:             Quote Post by Lui » Tue Jun 01, 2010 5:09 am I kinda thought it was a microphone..
